settings.title: PRACTICAL REAL-WORLD TRAINING
settings.visible_text:
Most programs hand you a textbook. NPTA puts you in the room.
At the core of every NPTA program is a dual-framework methodology that no other Canadian institution offers, the globally respected NASM OPT™ Model fused with the NPTA Apex Model™, our proprietary 10-pillar system engineered over 20+ years of real-world coaching mastery.
settings.hidden_text:
The NASM OPT™ Model gives you the science, a systematic, evidence-based approach to assessment, program design, and progressive training that is recognized by fitness employers worldwide. It is the technical foundation every elite trainer needs.

The NPTA Apex Model™ gives you the craft, developed by NPTA founder Jesse Benson and refined across two decades of practical experience, this 10-pillar methodology builds the human side of coaching that certifications alone can't teach: rapport, communication, coaching psychology, injury screening, nutrition, and the professional presence that turns first-time clients into lifelong ones.

Together, they create something rare, a trainer who doesn't just know what to do, but how to lead, connect, and transform.
This is hands-on learning with real stakes, real clients, and real outcomes.

settings.title: FLEXIBLE, SELF-PACED LEARNING
settings.description: Life doesn't pause for your education and it shouldn't have to. Courses are fully online, self-paced programming means you can pursue your certification without sacrificing your job, your family, or your training schedule.

settings.title: CAREER-READY, WORLDWIDE
settings.description: NPTA graduates don't just earn a credential- they launch careers. You leave with a globally respected NASM certification, a clear career pathway, and a support network built to help you land clients, get hired, and grow.

settings.results_promo_title: Ready to Become a Certified Fitness Professional?
settings.results_promo_text: NPTA offers comprehensive certification programs that will take your knowledge to the next level. Whether you want to launch your own fitness business or work with established gyms, we will give you the tools, knowledge, and credentials to succeed.

Nationally recognized certification
Evidence-based curriculum
Business and entrepreneurship training
Ongoing support and continuing education
settings.tier1_message: Wow! You scored in the top tier. You have what it takes to be an exceptional fitness professional. Your deep understanding of exercise science shows you are ready to take the next step.
settings.tier1_cta: You're already thinking like a certified trainer!
settings.tier2_message: Impressive! You have a solid foundation in fitness knowledge. With professional training and certification, you could turn this passion into a rewarding career helping others achieve their goals.
settings.tier2_cta: Imagine what you'll know after NPTA™ certification!
settings.tier3_message: Great job! You know more than the average gym-goer. There is so much more to discover about the science of fitness. The questions you missed reveal exciting areas you could master with proper education.
settings.tier3_cta: Ready to fill in the knowledge gaps?
settings.tier4_message: Everyone starts somewhere! Your curiosity about fitness is the first step. The science behind effective training is fascinating, and there is a whole world of knowledge waiting for you to explore.

settings.title: Trainer's Pick
settings.subhead: Chosen by Thousands. Trusted by Trainers. Built for Your Next Step.

settings.name: Kenneth
settings.quote: "You can teach an old dog new tricks 😂 something good came out of the pandemic for me!"

settings.name: Alex Jung Lee
settings.quote: "Throughout the NASM CPT certification course, I've gained a comprehensive understanding of the intrinsic value associated with health and wellness. I take great pride in successfully achieving the designation of NASM CPT. I am enthusiastic about leveraging my acquired knowledge to support and enhance the well-being of my family, friends, and community as a NASM Certified Personal Trainer."

settings.name: Helen
settings.quote: "𝐃𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬 💭 𝐝𝐨 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐞...𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈 𝐃𝐈𝐃 𝐈𝐓!⁣ Studying at 𝟓𝟕 is so very different than at 𝟏𝟗. Yet very possible.⁣"⁠

settings.name: Marina
settings.quote: “I’ve been a Personal Trainer for 8 years and chose NASM for their reputation and flexible schedule. The certification took 4 months at my own pace and was applicable to both my profession and personal routines. I’m excited to use my new credentials to help people achieve their fitness goals and improve their lifestyles. Thank you, NASM!”

settings.name: Frank
settings.quote: "Training isn't complete without nutrition. For those offering nutritional guidance, the NASM CNC is essential. In my nine years in fitness, it’s been one of the most comprehensive and insightful certifications. The sections on behavior change and coaching skills were transformative. I’m now equipped to assess client needs and provide tailored nutritional coaching for their fitness and lifestyle goals."

settings.name: Savanna
settings.quote: "Enrolling in NASM was one of the best decisions for my career as a Personal Trainer and Sports Nutritionist. The education provided was excellent and equipped me with essential knowledge for the fitness industry. I appreciated the focus on coaching, nutrition, and exercise techniques. Thanks to NASM, I feel empowered to pursue my passion and look forward to further education in fitness, health, and wellness. I highly recommend NASM for expanding your knowledge in the fitness industry."

settings.name: Kevin
settings.quote: "Becoming NASM Certified is a significant milestone for me. It represents the knowledge and skills I’ve acquired, and my dedication to helping others achieve their fitness goals."

settings.name: Felicitas Avendaño
settings.quote: "In 2018, I became a NASM Certified Personal Trainer (CPT) and Certified Nutrition Coach (CNC), turning a hobby into a full-time job with a busy schedule across two gyms, online clients, and home visits. Being a nutrition coach has enhanced my ability to help clients and added revenue streams to my business. I’m also proud to have been a gym owner for almost a year, enjoying the responsibility and freedom of leading my own team."

settings.section_description:
Real Stories. Real Results.

See how NASM-certified trainers turned passion into thriving careers. With the right certification and support, you’ll gain the skills, confidence, and opportunities to shape your own path.
